g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I set up Google Forms to save to Google Sheets?')
sendPrompt('How does Google Forms link to Google Sheets?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up a Google Apps Script webhook to call my Node.js app?')
sendPrompt('How do I write a Node.js webhook endpoint to receive Google Apps Script POST requests?')
sendPrompt('How do I use the Google Sheets API in Node.js to read a specific row?')
sendPrompt('How do I compute change scores and generate a radar chart in Node.js?')
sendPrompt('What are my options for generating a PDF or PNG growth card in Node.js?')
sendPrompt('How do I send a PDF attachment via email using Node.js?')
sendPrompt('How do I save the growth card back to Google Drive from Node.js?')
